subject: quick question - xcelerator legal support ews or corp?

emails.subject: Quick question - Xcelerator legal support EWS or Corp?
emails.subject_base: Quick question - Xcelerator legal support EWS or Corp?
emails.body: Quick question Xcelerator legal support EWS or Corp? Jim Given that the Xcelerator has been returned to Corporate from EWS, would you like me to continue to use Haedicke's group for legal support, or is there someone in corporate I should speak with instead? Thanks. Heath Heath Schiesser 713-345-4585 heath.schiesser@enron.com

emails.subject: Re: Quick question - Xcelerator legal support EWS or Corp?
emails.subject_base: Quick question - Xcelerator legal support EWS or Corp?
emails.body: Re: Quick question Xcelerator legal support EWS or Corp? Heath, continue to use Mark Haedicke's group for now. Jim Jim Derrick

emails.subject: FW: Quick question - Xcelerator legal support EWS or Corp?
emails.subject_base: Quick question - Xcelerator legal support EWS or Corp?
emails.body: FW: Quick question Xcelerator legal support EWS or Corp? Jim Thanks for returning my call yesterday. You actually covered my question in your email. Thanks for your quick response during this busy time. If there is anyway I can be of help, please let me know. Heath Heath Schiesser 713-345-4585 heath.schiesser@enron.com To: Schiesser, Heath
